cpu: AMD A10-4600M APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Game runs great with either disabling Proton D3d11 or using Wine's instead. However the kanji, hiragana and katakana characters are not visibly rendered, making running the program useless.
title: Kanji Training Game

cpu: AMD A10-4600M APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Added PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command% to launch options, and runs great in windowed mode, with all characters properly rendered.
title: Kanji Training Game
